---
title: "Sangīt Manjarī"
subtitle: "A transliteration of Pt. Ramprasanna Banerjee's 1907 anthology"
toc: false
---


The *Sangīt Manjarī* was first published in 1907 under the patronage of
Narendra Lall Khan, the king of Nārājole and Midnapore. This site
presents a careful transliteration of the original Bengali notation
into Roman script, preserving the swara-marks, octave indicators, and
tāl structure of the source.

Compositions are catalogued by rāga. Each page shows the lyrics
followed by a notated table aligned to the relevant tāl cycle.

---

*Transliterated by Dr. Suparno Bhattacharyya. Published by SIMA — the
Society for Indian Music and Arts.*
